word: G5237 - ὑπερείδω - hypereídō - hoop-er-i'-do - Wink at

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὑπερείδω

- Transliteration: Hupereido

- Phonetic: hoop-er-i'-do

- Definition:

1. to overlook, take no notice of, not attend to

- Origin: from G5228 and G1492

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5228 and G1492; to overlook that is not punish: - wink at.
